zh: 將近5歲時會很喜歡認字、
en: Near the age of five, children love learning to read,

zh: 時常追著人問「這是什麼字」、
en: constantly chasing adults asking "what does this say?"

zh: 同時對日曆和鐘錶與3C產品也開始感到興趣、
en: They also start taking interest in calendars, clocks, and electronic devices,

zh: 所以多數的孩子在入學前就能認識字母和數字了、
en: so most children can recognize letters and numbers before starting school.

zh: 這個時候也就是做好入學準備了。
en: By then, they are fully prepared to begin school.
